title: In /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config, verify test coverage/evidence for the Phase 0 handoff pipeline change. Compare against the 7-item test plan and acceptance criteria in ~/.claude/cache/handoff-phase0-codex.md and ~/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md. Return missing test...
summary_text: **Findings (Missing First)** 1. **No automated coverage exists for any of the 7 required Phase 0 tests.** Required tests are in [dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md#L173), but repo tests only cover smoke/guard/evidence plumbing, not `--delegation-context-file` / `--auto-context` / stale-run behavior. Evidence: [test-bridge-smoke.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-smoke.mjs#L11), [test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs#L16), and no matching assertions in test dirs (`rg` returned none). 2. **Existing script-level test suite is not green when actually run on commit `1c8023c7...`.** I executed `bash /tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/run-all.sh` ([run-all.sh](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/run-all.sh#L1)). Result: `12 passed, 2 failed` (`test-canon-v4-smoke.mjs`, `test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs`). Fail points: [test-canon-v4-smoke.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-canon-v4-smoke.mjs#L62), [test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-delegate-mcp-config.mjs#L56). 3. **Section 6 acceptance item “existing tests (Kernel 672, x-auto 198) pass” has no demonstrated evidence here.** I found no runnable suite in this commit that corresponds to those counts; package scripts do not define a `test` runner for them ([package.json](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/package.json#L6)). **7-Item Plan vs Evidence (commit `1c8023c7...`)** 1. `--auto-context` + `--delegation-context-file` on codex lane: **implemented in code, not test-verified** ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L360)). 2. Context file generation + 2048-byte cap: **implemented in code, not test-verified** ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L289)). 3. 3-lane parallel file isolation: **implementation suggests isolation (`{runId}--{agent}` + unique tmp), not test-verified** ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L296)). 4. Stale run_id skip: **implemented in code, not test-verified** ([delegate.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js#L398)). 5. Secret redaction in task context: **implemented in code, not test-verified** ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L292)). 6. Fallback when no `--delegation-context-file`: **implemented in code, not test-verified** ([delegate.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js#L392)). 7. `glm` lane unaffected (`--auto-context` absent): **implemented in code path, not test-verified** ([fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L356)). **Tests run vs implied** - **Actually run by me:** `scripts/tests/run-all.sh` at commit `1c8023c7...` (result: 12 pass / 2 fail). - **Only implied by static code inspection:** all 7 Phase 0 plan checks and most Section 6 items. - **Not run / no evidence found here:** “Kernel 672, x-auto 198” acceptance check.
